title: LongCat-Next: Lexicalizing Modalities as Discrete Tokens

details.title: LongCat-Next: Lexicalizing Modalities as Discrete Tokens
details.abstract: An open-source native multimodal model built with a pure discrete autoregressive architecture, supporting unified modeling for visual understanding, generation, audio, and language tasks.

title: Lingshu-Cell: A generative cellular world model for transcriptome modeling toward virtual cells

details.title: Lingshu-Cell: A generative cellular world model for transcriptome modeling toward virtual cells
details.abstract: ✨ Highlights Lingshu-Cell introduces a generative cellular world model for single-cell transcriptomics based on a masked discrete diffusion framework. Lingshu-Cell performs transcriptome-wide modeling over ~18,000 genes directly in a discrete token space that is compatible with the sparse, non-sequential nature of scRNA-seq data, without prior gene selection. Lingshu-Cell reproduces realistic cell populations across diverse tissues and species, capturing marker-gene expression patterns, cell-subtype proportions, and transcriptomic distributions. Lingshu-Cell achieves strong performance in response prediction under both genetic and cytokine perturbations.

title: CARLA-Air: Fly Drones Inside a CARLA World -- A Unified Infrastructure for Air-Ground Embodied Intelligence

details.title: CARLA-Air: Fly Drones Inside a CARLA World -- A Unified Infrastructure for Air-Ground Embodied Intelligence
details.abstract: CARLA-Air is an open-source infrastructure that unifies high-fidelity urban driving and physics-accurate multirotor flight within a single Unreal Engine process, providing a practical simulation foundation for air-ground embodied intelligence research.

title: OptiMer: Optimal Distribution Vector Merging Is Better than Data Mixing for Continual Pre-Training

details.title: OptiMer: Optimal Distribution Vector Merging Is Better than Data Mixing for Continual Pre-Training
details.abstract: 🤯 Struggling with dataset mixing ratios in LLM continual training? 🧩 We propose OptiMer: train one model per dataset, then merge them optimally. No more costly ratio tuning! 📄OptiMer: Optimal Distribution Vector Merging Is Better than Data Mixing for Continual Pre-Training 🔗 https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28858 My last work at @ NICT also related to our collaboration with @AISingapore

title: SeGPruner: Semantic-Geometric Visual Token Pruner for 3D Question Answering

details.title: SeGPruner: Semantic-Geometric Visual Token Pruner for 3D Question Answering
details.abstract: SeGPruner is a token pruning framework for 3D visual question answering that combines attention-based saliency selection with geometry-guided spatial diversification to reduce visual token count by 91% and inference latency by 86%, while preserving competitive reasoning performance across multi-view 3D scenes.

title: Terminal Agents Suffice for Enterprise Automation

details.title: Terminal Agents Suffice for Enterprise Automation
details.abstract: Terminal-based coding agents using direct API access can match or outperform GUI and tool-augmented agents for enterprise automation, suggesting strong foundation models with simple programmatic interfaces are often sufficient.

title: GaussianGPT: Towards Autoregressive 3D Gaussian Scene Generation

details.title: GaussianGPT: Towards Autoregressive 3D Gaussian Scene Generation

title: Think, Act, Build: An Agentic Framework with Vision Language Models for Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding

details.title: Think, Act, Build: An Agentic Framework with Vision Language Models for Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding
details.abstract: We introduce TAB (Think, Act, Build), a dynamic agentic framework designed for zero-shot 3D Visual Grounding (3D-VG). By operating directly on raw RGB-D streams, TAB reformulates 3D grounding from a static proposal matching task into an active semantic reasoning and geometric reconstruction process.

title: MMaDA-VLA: Large Diffusion Vision-Language-Action Model with Unified Multi-Modal Instruction and Generation

details.title: MMaDA-VLA: Large Diffusion Vision-Language-Action Model with Unified Multi-Modal Instruction and Generation
details.abstract: We present MMaDA-VLA, a fully native pre-trained large diffusion VLA model that unifies multi-modal understanding and generation in a single framework.
